stories.headline: Zendaya and Tom Holland kept their wedding quiet. Their 'Spider-Man' red carpet style is anything but. - Yahoo
stories.summary: The couple have brought their fashion A-game to Europe, embracing method dressing throughout their 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' promo tour.

stories.headline: Jesse James' Wife Bonnie Rotten Charged in Domestic Violence Case - TMZ
stories.summary: Bonnie Rotten's legal troubles with Jesse James aren't staying in the garage ... prosecutors have officially moved forward with criminal charges in her domestic violence case.

stories.headline: Boy falls down 50-foot waterfall after getting off Disneyland ride early - NBC News
stories.summary: Park officials said the 13-year-old was released from a hospital after being evaluated as a precaution.

stories.headline: Bailey Zimmerman issues apology after facing charges for trashing local resort - KOB.com
stories.summary: Singer Bailey Zimmerman issued an apology statement on Tuesday, after charges were filed for an incident said to have caused $16,000 in damage at Sandia Resort & Casino.

stories.headline: Jack White’s Wife Olivia Jean Files for Divorce Over "Inappropriate Marital Conduct" - E! News
stories.summary: The White Stripes frontman Jack White's wife of four years Olivia Jean filed for divorce in Nashville, citing "irreconcilable differences and inappropriate marital conduct" as the reason for breakup.

stories.headline: Melissa Gilbert leaves New York City apartment amid husband Timothy Busfield's child sex abuse case - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: Melissa Gilbert is bidding farewell to New York City. The 'Little House on the Prairie' alum reveals she is leaving the city amid her husband's ongoing child sex abuse case.

stories.headline: Former NCT Member Mark Lee’s Record Label Apologizes for Photos of Confederate Flag Shirt - Billboard
stories.summary: NCT ex-member Mark Lee's label has apologized after photos of him wearing a Confederate flag shirt surfaced online.

stories.headline: 'Magic School Bus' Live-Action Movie Kicks Into Gear as Rob Letterman Hops on Board to Direct - Gizmodo
stories.summary: Legendary Entertainment has acquired the rights to the film from Universal.
